summary: Iteration 39: Tested unified resume rendering architecture - all features verified working correctly. A4 document layout (794px x 1123px), RichEditor with centered document on gray background, toolbar within editor component, template switching (8 standard + 3 professional with photo), ATS-friendly section headings.
passed_tests: Resume AI page loads correctly with upload interface - VERIFIED
Upload functionality works - PDF uploaded and analyzed successfully - VERIFIED
Fix My Resume button works - AI improvement generated - VERIFIED
RichEditor displays as A4 document (794px width) centered on gray background (#e5e7eb) - VERIFIED
RichEditor toolbar stays within editor component (z-20 shadow-sm, not in page header) - VERIFIED
A4 document dimensions confirmed: docWidth=794px, minHeight=1123px - VERIFIED
ResumePreview renders with A4 dimensions and proper template styling - VERIFIED
Template switching works - Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Bold, Elegant, Corporate, Creative all visible - VERIFIED
Professional templates (professional, professional-blue, professional-minimal) visible with Photo badge - VERIFIED
ATS-friendly section headings: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY, WORK EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS - VERIFIED
Edit Text button works - RichEditor displayed with full toolbar - VERIFIED
Preview/Edit Text/Edit Sections/Download PDF buttons all visible and functional - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: RichEditor.jsx: A4 dimensions correctly defined (794x1123px) at lines 11-12
RichEditor.jsx: Toolbar positioned within editor container with z-20 shadow-sm (line 280), becomes sticky only when scrolled past editor top
RichEditor.jsx: Gray background (#e5e7eb) applied to container, white A4 document centered with shadow-xl
ResumePreview.jsx: TEMPLATE_CONFIGS defines all 11 templates including 3 professional with hasPhoto:true
ResumePreview.jsx: ATS-friendly section patterns normalize headings to PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY, WORK EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS
A4PageRenderer.jsx: Unified rendering component with consistent A4 dimensions and template styling
seed_data_creation: Used test PDF at /tmp/test_resume.pdf for upload testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 verified the unified resume rendering architecture: 1) RichEditor displays as A4 document (794x1123px) centered on gray background with toolbar at top of editor (not page header), 2) ResumePreview uses unified A4Page component with TEMPLATE_CONFIGS for all 11 templates, 3) A4PageRenderer.jsx provides reusable rendering engine, 4) All templates use ATS-friendly section headings (PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY, WORK EXPERIENCE, EDUCATION, SKILLS), 5) Professional templates (3) have photo support with single-column layout. Template switching, Edit Text, and Preview modes all working correctly.
